title: agropyron × cristatum var. baicalense
intro: Agropyron × cristatum var. baicalense, also known as Baikal needlegrass, is a type of hybrid grass that is native to the mountainous regions of Asia, particularly in China and Russia. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Baikal needlegrass include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular ingredient in traditional remedies for colds and flu. In herbal preparations, Baikal needlegrass is often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
